english: What is the main advantage of using UPI payment in India?
hindi: भारत में UPI भुगतान का मुख्य लाभ क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் யூ.पி.ஐ தளர்வு பயன்பாட்டின் முக்கிய நன்மை யாது?
vietnamese: Tính năng chính của việc sử dụng thanh toán UPI ở Ấn Độ là gì?
correct_answer: The main advantage of using UPI payment in India is that it allows users to make instant transactions using their mobile phones, reducing the need for physical cash and cheques.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that UPI payment is only for online transactions or by refusing to answer due to lack of context, or by providing a factual error that UPI payment is only available for credit card holders.
